name: Pineapple Upside-Down Cake #3
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 C). Drain the pineapple well in a sieve, discarding the liquid. Spray the sides and bottom of a 9-inch square pan with vegetable oil spray and melt the butter in the preheated oven. Add the brown sugar to the butter and blend. Spread the drained pineapple evenly over the sugar mixture; do not mix. Mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and mace. Add the softened butter, milk, and vanilla extract. Beat on low speed for 1 1/2 minutes, then add the egg and beat an additional 1 1/2 minutes. Spread the batter evenly over the pineapple with a rubber spatula; the batter will be quite thick. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a skewer inserted into the middle of the cake comes out clean. Remove from oven, loosen the edges with a knife, and invert immediately onto a platter. Let cool.
